title: Urgent Opening Teacher at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services:
TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services!
